creator: c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
text:
I would like to request the ownership of irc/kvirc I have spoken with the maintainer and he agrees. Or at least I think he does :)

Am Montag, 22. Juni 2009 schrieben Sie:
> > Hello,
> >
> > I would like to request onwership of this port, as the past years I have
> > seen this port lag behind the rest. Since this is a port I use a lot,
> > maintaining it would be simple as upgrading the program with each release.
> >
> > What do you think?

Its ok for me, because I do not use kvirc and IRC very much at the moment.

Mike

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
